note: Read-only mirror of 8 real TIBER-Data player_season_coverage_v0 rows (2022-2024, 4 players) used by the player-history feature extraction scaffold (#103), following the controlled experiment design in #101/PR #102. This is a separate, purpose-built mirror from the PR #100 gate mirror -- that one has 4 rows, at most 1 per player, which cannot exercise multi-season aggregation. This mirror's 4 players were selected specifically to cover: full 3-season presence, single-season presence, an undrafted player, and a within-window multi-team season. Forecast does not modify, re-govern, re-derive, or promote this data. No 2025 row exists in this file.

mirrored_file.derivedFrom: TIBER-Data: data/processed/evidence/player_season_coverage_2022_2025.source_backed.json (as merged to main in PR #191)
mirrored_file.derivation_method: 8 rows (4 players x up to 3 seasons each) copied verbatim from the real, committed TIBER-Data artifact, trimmed to the fields the feature-extraction scaffold needs. No values are fabricated or estimated.
